ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the product */,
  "product_image" TEXT /* Image of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for subcategories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the size chart belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the size chart */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  "standard_size_chart" INTEGER /* Whether the size chart is the standard for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart the size belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., S, M, L) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence of the size (for sorting purposes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type (e.g., length, bust, shoulder, sleeve) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance for the measurement (for quality control) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_measurement_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("measurement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type (e.g., length, bust, shoulder, sleeve) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the region or country */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region or country */,
  "default_language" TEXT /* Default language for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "size_standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the size standard belongs to */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart the size standard belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the size standard */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_standards_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_standards_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, product manager, customer service representative) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the preference belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the preference belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the preference belongs to */,
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type the preference belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the preference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_measurement_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("measurement_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who placed the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the order item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the review belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the question belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who asked the question */,
  "question" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Text of the answer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the question was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_questions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_questions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
